history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A cute anime-style chibi character with bright pink hair styled in a ponytail, adorned with a black bow. The character has large, expressive purple eyes with intricate irises and is wearing round, transparent glasses. Adorable cat ears with white fluff inside peek out from the top of her head, and a matching tail is visible on the left side of the image. She's wearing a white collared shirt with a pink bow tie and a dark apron. The character is giving a thumbs-up gesture with her right hand, with small black lines indicating movement or emphasis. The background is a solid, soft pink color. The overall style is cheerful, innocent, and playful, with soft shading and clean lines characteristic of digital anime art. The lighting appears even and bright, contributing to the overall cheerful mood. The color palette is dominated by shades of pink, with accents of black, white, and purple.
